name: translate
_note: translation.translate is an LLM-hint macro (skipped by the assassin's adversarial driver, static contract only). Real translation genuinely requires the local LLM; offline/brain-down it fails HONESTLY with translation_unavailable rather than fabricate a wrong translation (the live_* external-IO discipline). Validation rejects (text required / targetLanguage required) fire BEFORE any LLM call, so they hold with or without a brain.
